option.name: text
option.value:
* Read at least twice the user prompt before starting. When in doubt, ask the user.
* Do not make any changes beyond what was explicitly requested.
* Never apply unsolicited improvements, refactors, cleanups, renaming, formatting, architectural changes, or behavioral changes.
* If you notice bugs, possible improvements, or refactoring opportunities, do not implement them. Instead, list them at the end of the response under a `Suggestions` section as bullet points.
* Preserve the existing structure, style, and logic unless the request explicitly requires changing them.
* Do not use complete paths, prefer importing * Avoid: androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext.current * Prefer: LocalContext.current
* After completing all requested changes, verify that the project compiles successfully.
* Do not run compilation, builds, or heavy validation steps multiple times during the process unless explicitly necessary.
* Prefer a single final validation after all modifications are finished.
* All code comments must be written in Spanish, regardless of the project language.
* Any user-facing text must use localization resources (`stringResource`, `context.getString`, etc.).
* First check whether a suitable string already exists in `strings.xml`. * Reuse existing strings whenever possible. * Only use hardcoded text if no suitable resource exists. * If hardcoded text is necessary, add a `TODO` comment indicating it should be moved to `strings.xml`.

option.name: text
option.value:
Generate git commit messages following the Conventional Commits specification.
Format: - `<type>(<scope>): <description>` - The `scope` is optional but recommended when the change affects a specific part of the project.
Allowed types: - feat - fix - refactor - style - docs - test - chore - perf - build - ci
Rules: - Write the message in Spanish. - Do not end with a period. - Keep it concise and descriptive. - Describe what changed, not why. - Use an action-oriented description. - Choose a short and meaningful scope when applicable. - Do not include extra explanations or formatting. - Do not focus on where the changes were made, but what do they do. - Do NOT output names, e-mail addresses, or any other personally identifiable information - Do NOT output bug IDs or any other unique identifiers
Examples: - feat(auth): add jwt refresh token support - fix(api): prevent NPE on login - refactor(ui): extract dialog state logic - chore(deps): update angular dependencies
You cand see the commit diff in $COMMIT_DIFF
